positive: A vibrant, geometric abstract illustration featuring stylized constellations and nebulae swirling around a central, simplified celestial map. The composition should be highly contrasted, utilizing deep cosmic blues, vibrant electric purples, and pops of glowing teal and gold. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes and interconnected lines that mimic both constellations and tribal patterns. The overall aesthetic must be modern, mystical, and graphically perfect, suitable for a central placement on apparel. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets cosmic psychedelia. Lighting: High contrast backlighting emphasizing glow and depth. Composition: Central focus, symmetrical elements, scalable detail. Print-friendly detail: Crisp lines, solid color blocks, vector-like quality, minimal gradient noise.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, smudge, artifact, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, poorly drawn, mutated, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, realistic, photographic, jpeg artifacts
